# CollageLab

> A creative ecosystem for artists, musicians, sculptors, poets, filmmakers, and makers. Born in Ottawa.

CollageLab is a creative space where all arts are accepted. We publish weekly issues featuring local artists and what's happening in the creative community. Submissions are always open and free.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Discover featured artists, upcoming issues, and the creative ecosystem.
- [Collage](/creators): Browse this week's featured artists and creators.
- [Submit](/submit): Submit your work to be featured in an upcoming issue.
- [About](/about): Learn about CollageLab and our mission.
- [Advertise](/advertise): Partner with us and reach the creative community.
- [Subscribe](/subscribe): Get a short weekly email with a featured artist and local happenings.
- [Find Us](/find-us): Contact and connect with CollageLab.
